spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — WGSL subgroups extension adds subgroup_id and num_subgroups built-ins for compute shaders…

interactive.rationale: 1 buttons / 2 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on compute, subgroup, subgroups).

edge_cases.rationale: Some fallback / error handling is present but corner cases like removed-element behaviour, denied permission flow, or no-support browsers aren't all covered.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5072447137251328 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 8 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 8 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

summary: subgroup-id under webgpu-subgroup-id-feature: 4 pass / 2 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story complete.
